name: Create a Python file
task: Create a file called /tmp/eval_hello.py that contains a function called greet(name) which returns the string 'Hello, {name}!'

validation.script: import importlib.util, sys; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m', '/tmp/eval_hello.py'); m = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(m); assert m.greet('World') == 'Hello, World!', f'Expected Hello, World! got {m.greet("World")}'; print('OK')
